subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto God! They who are endowed with insight, upon beholding the signs of mortality in whatsoever existeth in the realm of being, do turn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله آنچه در عالم وجود موجود صاحبان بصر حین ملاحظه آثار فنا از آن
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
